name: In Two Years!! At the Sabaody Archipelago!!
effect_text: [Main] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 "Straw Hat Crew" type Character card and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order. [Trigger] Activate this card's [Main] effect.  This card has been officially errata'd.
